summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TextNow/Caddy clone with 2026 landing page. All major features working correctly including stunning landing page, authentication, dashboard with dialer keypad, and backend API integration.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when trying to add existing number (expected behavior)
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - user already has the number

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and 2026 design
Features section displays 6 feature cards correctly
Pricing section shows 3 plans (Free, Unlimited, Business)
Navigation 'Get Started Free' button redirects to /auth
Login form works with demo2@gummytext.com credentials
Dashboard loads with phone number (681) 261-4963 and 25 credits
Dialer tab works with full number keypad (0-9, *, #)
All authentication endpoints working (login, logout, auth/me)
Messaging endpoints working with Twilio integration
Twilio integration working (1 owned number, 20+ available numbers)
